idea-plugin.name: Flint — Fleet GitOps
idea-plugin.description:
Real-time validation and IntelliSense for Fleet GitOps YAML files.
  • 17 lint rules: structural, semantic, security, deprecation
  • Autocompletion for all Fleet YAML fields
  • Hover documentation with Fleet docs links
  • Go-to-definition for path references
  • Inline diagnostics with quick-fix code actions
  • osquery table/platform compatibility checking
Requires the flint binary on PATH. Install via: brew install fleetdm/tap/flint or download from GitHub Releases.
